Service de voiturier: Vous garez les véhicules de nos clients dans le garage souterrain et gérez la logistique du garage, toujours avec attention au détail et à la commande. Transferts aux clients : Qu'il s'agisse de l'ascenseur de ski ou du restaurant, vous gérez les transferts des clients avec la navette de l'hôtel, assurant un trajet sûr et agréable. Services aux clients: chargement/déchargement des bagages des clients et manutention de petites courses au besoin. - Oui. C'est vous Amabilité naturelle et Charisme: Vous pouvez presque anticiper les besoins de nos clients éclairés et faire tout votre possible pour que leur séjour soit le plus agréable possible. Comparance groomed et Excellent Manners : Vous représentez notre hôtel avec style, impressionnant avec politesse professionnelle et un comportement élégant. Esprit d'équipe et flexibilité : Vous aimez travailler dans une équipe dynamique, s'adapter rapidement à diverses exigences, toujours avec un sourire. Permis de conduire valide : Bien sûr, vous avez un permis de conduire valide et vous sentez à l'aise manoeuvrer dans des espaces de stationnement serrés et sur la route. Compétences linguistiques: Idéalement, vous parlez l'allemand et l'anglais, avec des langues supplémentaires (surtout l'italien) étant un avantage de bienvenue. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. Appliquer maintenant ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hôtel Kronenhof 100% Les personnes à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nousVous êtes la voix de notre hôtel: Que ce soit par téléphone ou par e-mail, vous créez des offres convaincantes, confirmez les réservations et assurez-vous que les suivis sont traités avec précision – le tout conforme aux normes LHW et ISO. Vous pensez en termes d'occupation et d'opportunité: Vous gardez notre plan de réservation précis et à jour, contribuant activement à l'utilisation optimale de notre inventaire de chambre. Vous donnez vie aux chiffres : En étroite collaboration avec le gestionnaire adjoint exécutif et le gestionnaire de l'administration centrale, vous élaborez des prévisions et des rapports essentiels à la planification quotidienne. Vous êtes méticuleux avec les données: Les profils et bases de données des invités sont tenus à jour avec soin et discrétion – la structure et la conformité font partie de votre ADN. Vous restez devant la courbe : De la gestion du système Channel Manager à l'affinage continu de nos normes ISO et RIMS, vous assurez un bon fonctionnement et apportez de nouvelles idées à la table. Vous transformez le potentiel en performance: La vente est plus qu'une tâche pour vous – c'est un moyen d'améliorer le voyage des invités et de créer une valeur ajoutée significative. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Parce que vous allez faire partie de l'un des hôtels les plus renommés de Suisse – un endroit où vous ne travaillez pas, vous aidez à façonner l'avenir. Vous serez entouré de professionnels passionnés et vivrez une culture d'équipe définie par l'élégance, l'authenticité et la collaboration. Voici votre formation professionnelle: Vous avez suivi une formation professionnelle en hospitalité ou dans un domaine commercial – idéalement au sein de l'hospitalité de luxe – et vous offrez plusieurs années d'expérience pertinente. État d'esprit des ventes: Vous comprenez ce qui motive les décisions de réservation et comment élever l'expérience des clients à travers les ventes de chambres stratégiques. Compétences linguistiques : Vous parlez et écrivez couramment en allemand et en anglais; une connaissance supplémentaire du français ou de l'italien est un plus. Composure & clarté: Que ce soit sous pression ou en communication directe avec les clients, vous restez professionnel, efficace et chaleureux. Orientation vers la croissance & #160;: Vous êtes impatient non seulement de répondre aux attentes, mais d'améliorer les processus et d'investir dans votre propre développement. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Nachtportier/ Auditeur de nuit (m/w/d) Grand Hôtel Kronenhof 100% Les personnes à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nousFront Office & Guest: Traitement des arrivées tardives et des départs anticipés, fournissant une assistance professionnelle aux clients par téléphone, et répondant aux demandes spéciales des clients. Service de voiturier et de bagages: Parking des véhicules invités dans le garage ainsi que de l'aide pour le service de bagages et de chambres. Audit de nuit : Compléter la fermeture quotidienne du système (Opera Cloud), vérifier les rapports des points de vente et gérer le traitement physique des espèces pour le service comptable. Sécurité & Contrôle & #160;: Effectuer régulièrement des rondes de sécurité, surveiller le panneau d'alarme incendie et assurer la paix et la tranquillité nocturnes dans l'ensemble des locaux. Préparation: Générer des rapports département, acheter et poster des journaux, et fournir des services de cire de chaussures pour nos invités. C'est vousExpérience: Une solide expérience dans l'industrie hôtelière (de préférence dans le segment 5 étoiles) et idéalement une expérience antérieure dans les équipes de nuit. Les Compétence : Gestion fiable des systèmes PMS (Opera Cloud) ainsi que des applications MS Office standard. Langues : Connaissance de l'allemand et de l'anglais ; la connaissance de l'italien est un avantage important en raison de notre emplacement et de notre clientèle. Engagement : Un permis de conduire valide et l'aptitude physique requise pour les rondes de sécurité et la manutention des bagages. Personnalité : Un haut sens des responsabilités, une discrétion absolue et une apparence polie qui répond à nos standards de luxe. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Les personnes à 1800m au-dessus du niveau de la mer façonnent le voyage de montagne de luxe. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : Voici ce que vous déménagez avec nous. Vous répondez aux demandes écrites et téléphoniques de manière professionnelle et axée sur le service, en étroite coordination avec l'équipe de conciergerie. Appui administratif : Vous aidez l'équipe de conciergerie dans les opérations quotidiennes en gérant de manière fiable les tâches administratives et l'horaire. Gestion des données et documentation : Vous maintenez l'information des invités et des aperçus internes, assurant une documentation précise et bien organisée des données pertinentes. Optimisation du processus : Vous identifiez les possibilités de rationaliser les flux de travail et de mettre en œuvre des solutions d'automatisation mineures à l'aide d'outils tels que Power Automate ou Zapier. Coordination des services administratifs : Vous surveillez les tâches, les délais et la communication interne, assurant ainsi un flux d'information en douceur au sein de l'équipe. Assurance qualité : Vous aidez à surveiller les outils et les systèmes utilisés et à apporter des idées pour améliorer l'offre globale de services aux clients. C'est vousUn style de travail structuré et autonome avec un fort sens de la qualité, de la discrétion et de la fiabilité. Excellentes compétences en communication orale et écrite en allemand et en anglais – toute langue supplémentaire, en particulier l'italien, est un plus. Une passion pour l'organisation, de solides compétences numériques et l'utilisation confiante des applications MS Office. Un état d'esprit axé sur le service : vous vous voyez comme un membre de l'équipe de soutien travaillant dans les coulisses – et vous savez que les expériences exceptionnelles des invités sont construites sur un excellent back office. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Florist (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Florist (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Responsible for all floral arrangements in our hotel, including creating centerpieces, bouquets, etc.
Decorating public spaces not only for daily use but also for special occasions such as holidays, gala events, private functions, etc.
Organizing and advising on outdoor landscaping
Proper care of flowers and green plants
Procurement of all flowers, plants, and materials
Concept development and implementation while adhering to the specified budget

## This is you
You have successfully completed training in floristry and have several years of experience (preferably in the hotel industry)
With a creative flair, you know how to delight our guests with your floral decorations and create an impressive atmosphere and unique ambiance within and outside our luxury hotel
You are flexible, appreciate good communication, and are accustomed to working independently.
Even under pressure, you remain composed and calm, and you have a natural and friendly demeanor towards guests and colleagues.
Languages: English or German

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usCreating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.
This is youHolder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Florist (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usThe Kulm Hotel is world-renowned for its magnificent halls and meticulous attention to detail. As the right hand to our Head Florist, you will play a key role in transforming our hotel into a blooming masterpiece. You are more than a florist – you are an ambassador of aesthetics and elegance.Your Mission:Creative Staging: You will take a leading role in the entire floral design—from delicate table arrangements to grand, imposing bouquets for our most exclusive suites.Event Highlights: Showcase your skills in large-scale floral design during glamorous weddings, gala evenings, and major seasonal projects (such as our legendary Christmas and New Year's Eve decorations).Perfection in Detail: You ensure a consistently flawless appearance of all arrangements and green plants, both indoors and outdoors.Taking Responsibility: You support the department head operationally, coordinate flower deliveries, and ensure that our high quality standards are felt in every single arrangement.Start Date: June 1st, 2026 
This is youFoundation: You have a completed vocational training as a Florist and initial professional experience in the field.Creative Passion: You have a sharp eye for colors, shapes, and current trends. Your goal is to create an "imposing atmosphere" for our international guests.Composure: Even during major events and high-volume periods, you work precisely and efficiently, always maintaining an eye for the smallest detail.Personality: Your appearance is as polished as your floral work. You are a proactive communicator within the team and a warm point of contact for our guests.Languages: You are able to communicate effectively in either German or English.Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a stage for your creativity in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Become part of a team that values true craftsmanship, encourages initiative, and thrives in a culture of mutual respect and team spirit.Are you ready to make the Kulm bloom? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Spa Therapist (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usPamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area.
This is youCompleted training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Fiorista (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. # Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Responsabile per tutte le composizioni floreali nel nostro hotel, tra cui la creazione di pezzi centrali, mazzi di fiori, ecc. Decorare spazi pubblici non solo per uso quotidiano ma anche per occasioni speciali come feste, eventi di gala, funzioni private, ecc. Organizzazione e consulenza su paesaggi all'aperto Cura corretta di fiori e piante verdi Approvvigionamento di tutti i fiori, piante e materiali Sviluppo e implementazione del concetto, aderendo al budget specificato ## Sei tu che hai completato con successo la formazione in fioraio e hai diversi anni di esperienza (preferibilmente nel settore alberghiero) Con un tocco creativo, si sa come deliziare i nostri ospiti con le vostre decorazioni floreali e creare un'atmosfera impressionante e un ambiente unico dentro e fuori il nostro hotel di lusso Sei flessibile, apprezzi la buona comunicazione, e sono abituati a lavorare indipendentemente. Anche sotto pressione, si rimane composti e calmi, e si dispone di un demeanor naturale e amichevole verso gli ospiti e colleghi. Lingue: Inglese o tedesco ## Benefits At Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è quello che ti muovi con noiCreare momenti di piscina perfetti: Garantisci operazioni fluide nella piscina e nella zona sauna mantenendo ogni dettaglio in vista. Un ospite a cuore: Con un sorriso caldo, accogliate i nostri ospiti e curateli attentamente in tutta la zona spa e piscina. Igiene al massimo livello: Mantenete la pulizia e l'ordine in tutto il centro benessere e fate controlli di qualità giornalieri. I momenti di benessere: Con le vostre competenze aggiuntive in infusioni di sauna, palestra acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i nostri ospiti più giovani, contribuite attivamente alla loro esperienza di relax e gioia in acqua. Questo è YouHolder del “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) con solida conoscenza di pronto soccorso. Esperienza nelle operazioni in piscina e competenze nella conduzione di infusioni di sauna, palestra acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i bambini. Eccellente tedesco e inglese competenze; lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio. Una personalità attenta e calorosa con un forte senso di servizio e quella speciale cosa che delizia gli ospiti. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Fiorista (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno plasmando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che si muove con noiIl Kulm Hotel è di fama mondiale per le sue magnifiche sale e meticolosa attenzione ai dettagli. Come la mano destra al nostro fiorista capo, si giocherà un ruolo chiave nel trasformare il nostro hotel in un capolavoro fiorente. Sei più di un fiorista – sei un ambasciatore di estetica ed eleganza. jobs.description:
Florist (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
The Kulm Hotel is world-renowned for its magnificent halls and meticulous attention to detail. As the right hand to our Head Florist, you will play a key role in transforming our hotel into a blooming masterpiece. You are more than a florist – you are an ambassador of aesthetics and elegance.Your Mission:Creative Staging: You will take a leading role in the entire floral design—from delicate table arrangements to grand, imposing bouquets for our most exclusive suites.
Event Highlights: Showcase your skills in large-scale floral design during glamorous weddings, gala evenings, and major seasonal projects (such as our legendary Christmas and New Year's Eve decorations).
Perfection in Detail: You ensure a consistently flawless appearance of all arrangements and green plants, both indoors and outdoors.
Taking Responsibility: You support the department head operationally, coordinate flower deliveries, and ensure that our high quality standards are felt in every single arrangement.
Start Date: June 1st, 2026

## This is you
Foundation: You have a completed vocational training as a Florist and initial professional experience in the field.
Creative Passion: You have a sharp eye for colors, shapes, and current trends. Your goal is to create an "imposing atmosphere" for our international guests.
Composure: Even during major events and high-volume periods, you work precisely and efficiently, always maintaining an eye for the smallest detail.
Personality: Your appearance is as polished as your floral work. You are a proactive communicator within the team and a warm point of contact for our guests.
Languages: You are able to communicate effectively in either German or English.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a stage for your creativity in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Become part of a team that values true craftsmanship, encourages initiative, and thrives in a culture of mutual respect and team spirit.Are you ready to make the Kulm bloom? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. # Questo è ciò che si muove con noi Il Kulm Hotel è di fama mondiale per le sue magnifiche sale e meticolosa attenzione ai dettagli. Sei più di un fiorista – sei un ambasciatore di estetica ed eleganza. La vostra missione: Creative Staging: Prenderai un ruolo di primo piano nell'intero design floreale—dall'allestimento di tavoli delicati a grandi mazzi imponenti per le nostre suite più esclusive. Eventi: Mostra le tue competenze nel design floreale su larga scala durante matrimoni glamour, serate di gala e grandi progetti stagionali (come le nostre decorazioni natalizie e Capodanno). Composure: Anche durante eventi importanti e periodi ad alto volume, si lavora con precisione ed efficienza, mantenendo sempre un occhio per i minimi dettagli. Personalità: Il tuo aspetto è lucido come il tuo lavoro floreale. Sei un comunicatore proattivo all'interno del team e un punto di contatto caldo per i nostri ospiti. Lingue: Siete in grado di comunicare efficacemente in tedesco o in inglese. Perché il gruppo Kulm? Vi offriamo un palcoscenico per la vostra creatività in una delle posizioni più esclusive del mondo. Diventa parte di un team che valorizza la vera artigianalità, incoraggia l'iniziativa e prospera in una cultura del rispetto reciproco e dello spirito di squadra. Sei pronto a far fiorire il Kulm? Thai-Massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, Reflexologie, Lymphdrainage) sind ein Vorteil. Idealerweise Erfahrung in Fitness-Klassen wie Yoga oder Pilates. Bewährte Erfahrung im Wellnessbereich, bevorzugt in der Luxus-Hospitalität. Ausgezeichnete Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Deutsch und Englisch und eine Sensibilität für die Wünsche unserer Gäste. Flexibilität bei der Arbeit von Wochenenden, Feiertagen und besonderen Veranstaltungen wie unserem Night Spa. VorteileAt Kulm Group, unsere Mitarbeiter sind das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, erschwingliche Mahlzeiten im Personalrestaurant und zahlreiche Getränke.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Floriste (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonnelle / Saisonnier. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. - Oui. C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous L'Hôtel Kulm est mondialement reconnu pour ses magnifiques salles et son attention méticuleuse au détail. En tant que main droite à notre fleuriste de tête, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans la transformation de notre hôtel en un chef-d'œuvre fleuri. Vous êtes plus qu'un fleuriste – vous êtes un ambassadeur d'esthétique et d'élégance. Votre mission : Stagging créatif : Vous jouerez un rôle de premier plan dans l'ensemble de la décoration florale et mdash ; des arrangements de table délicats aux grands bouquets imposants pour nos suites les plus exclusives. Faits saillants de l'événement : Montrez vos compétences en design floral à grande échelle lors de mariages glamour, de soirées de gala et de grands projets saisonniers (comme nos légendaires décorations de Noël et du Nouvel An). Perfection en détail : Vous assurez une apparence toujours impeccable de toutes les dispositions et plantes vertes, à l'intérieur comme à l'extérieur. Prise de responsabilité : Vous soutenez le chef du département sur le plan opérationnel, coordonnez les livraisons de fleurs et veillez à ce que nos normes de qualité soient ressenties dans chaque arrangement. Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Oui. Voici la Fondation : Vous avez une formation professionnelle complète en tant que fleuriste et expérience professionnelle initiale dans le domaine. Passion créative : Vous avez un œil vif pour les couleurs, les formes et les tendances actuelles. Votre objectif est de créer une « atmosphère d'impression » pour nos invités internationaux. Composition: Même pendant les événements majeurs et les périodes de grand volume, vous travaillez avec précision et efficacité, en gardant toujours un œil pour les moindres détails. Personnalité : Votre apparence est aussi polie que votre travail floral. Vous êtes un communicateur proactif au sein de l'équipe et un point de contact chaleureux pour nos invités. Langues: Vous pouvez communiquer efficacement en allemand ou en anglais. Pourquoi le groupe Kulm ? Nous vous offrons une scène pour votre créativité dans l'un des endroits les plus exclusifs du monde. Devenez membre d'une équipe qui valorise l'artisanat, encourage l'initiative et prospère dans une culture de respect mutuel et d'esprit d'équipe. Êtes-vous prêt à faire fleurir le Kulm ? Nous sommes impatients de recevoir votre candidature! ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. jobs.title: Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

## This is what you move with us
In this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.
Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”
Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”
Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.
Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”
Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.
Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.
Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%).

## This is you
Foundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.
Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).
Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.
Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”
Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.
Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.
Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%).

## This is you
Foundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.
Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).
Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.
Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.title: Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-01.

## This is what you move with us
Luxurious. Ambitious. Visionary. In this newly created key position, you will actively shape the culinary direction of our property as the strategic driving force behind our Food & Beverage concepts. In this role, you will design the future of our F&B world — visionary, bold, and with the ambition to take excellence to the next level. What makes this role unique:Leadership at eye level: You lead a team of seven experienced department heads and approximately 70 employees — with clarity, inspiration, and a genuine talent for developing people.
Concept architect & innovator: You evaluate existing concepts, develop new ideas, identify F&B trends and deliberately leverage them. You think on the next level and create experiences that excite our guests.
Strategy meets profitability: Budgeting, forecasting, margin optimization — your decisions are data-driven while always keeping the guest experience at the forefront.
Operational excellence: You establish quality standards, simplify processes, implement new tools, and modernize systems. For you, efficiency is a result of strong leadership.
Connector & multiplier: You act as a strategic partner to General Management, Culinary, Marketing, Sales, and Events — with foresight, professionalism, and outstanding communication skills.
Creating experiences rather than just planning them: From wine tastings and pop-up concepts to signature events — you curate memorable moments that stay with our guests long after their stay.

## This is you
Completed training in hospitality or gastronomy – ideally complemented by further education in management.
 Several years of leadership experience in the F&B department of a luxury hotel.
 Excellent command of German and English; Italian is an advantage.
 Entrepreneurial mindset, strong affinity with numbers, and a sharp sense for quality.
 Hands-on mentality, diplomatic skills, and a confident presence in every situation.
  Are you ready to set new culinary standards and work with a passionate team at the highest level? Then we look forward to receiving your application.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

descriptionByLocale.it: Direttore Food & Beverage (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Orario: 100%. Contratto: Indeterminato / Permanente. Inizio: 2026-02-01. ## Questo è ciò che realizzi con noi Lussuoso. Ambizioso. Visionario. In questa posizione chiave appena creata, modellerai attivamente l'indirizzo culinario della nostra struttura come forza trainante strategica dei nostri concetti Food & Beverage. Progetterai il futuro del nostro mondo F&B — visionario, audace e con l'ambizione di portare l'eccellenza al livello successivo. Cosa rende unico questo ruolo: Leadership a livello pari: guidi un team di sette responsabili di reparto esperti e circa 70 dipendenti — con chiarezza, ispirazione e un vero talento per lo sviluppo delle persone. Architetto di concetti e innovatore: valuti i concetti esistenti, sviluppi nuove idee, identifichi le tendenze F&B e le sfrutti deliberatamente. Pensi al livello successivo e crei esperienze che entusiasmano i nostri ospiti. Strategia incontra la redditività: budgeting, forecasting, ottimizzazione dei margini — le tue decisioni sono guidate dai dati, mantenendo sempre al centro l'esperienza dell'ospite. Eccellenza operativa: stabilisci standard di qualità, semplifichi i processi, implementi nuovi strumenti e modernizzi i sistemi. Per te, l'efficienza è il risultato di una leadership forte. Connettore e moltiplicatore: agisci come partner strategico per la Direzione Generale, la Cucina, il Marketing, le Vendite e gli Eventi — con lungimiranza, professionalità e capacità comunicative eccellenti. Creare esperienze anziché semplicemente pianificarle: dalle degustazioni di vini ai concetti pop‑up, fino agli eventi firmati — curi momenti memorabili che rimangono con i nostri ospiti molto tempo dopo il loro soggiorno. ## Questo sei tu Formazione completata in ospitalità o gastronomia — idealmente integrata da ulteriori studi in management. Diversi anni di esperienza di leadership nel dipartimento F&B di un hotel di lusso. Eccellente padronanza del tedesco e dell'inglese; l'italiano è un vantaggio. Mentalità imprenditoriale, forte affinità con i numeri e senso acuto della qualità. Mentalità pratica, capacità diplomatiche e presenza sicura in ogni situazione. Sei pronto a fissare nuovi standard culinari e a lavorare con un team appassionato al più alto livello? Allora attendiamo con piacere la tua candidatura. ## Benefit Nel Gruppo Kulm, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo opportunità di sviluppo interessanti, alloggi confortevoli, pasti a prezzo agevolato nella mensa per il personale e numerosi vantaggi. [Apply now] ## Cuoco – Mensa del personale (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Persone a 1800 m di altitudine stanno plasmando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti un lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E così abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione e un’esperienza di vita. Insieme lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura in evoluzione: La tua missione Il tuo palcoscenico – il nostro cuore dietro le quinte: nel nostro hotel non sono solo gli ospiti a essere al centro della scena — anche i dipendenti meritano momenti culinari che ispirino. Come Cuoco nella nostra Mensa del personale appena creata, sei sia ospite che esperto culinario. Con cucina fresca e creativa e un orecchio attento ai desideri del team, aiuti i colleghi a sentirsi davvero a casa. Le tue responsabilità Preparazione di menù vari e bilanciati per il nostro team — con attenzione ai dettagli e passione per la qualità. Essere l'host nella mensa del personale: accoglienza, coinvolgimento e creazione di un’atmosfera positiva. Pianificazione dei menù e realizzazione di settimane tematiche culinarie — le tue idee sono benvenute. Combinazione di servizio a buffet e cucina dal vivo. Garantire operazioni fluide nella tua sezione — dalla mise en place alla chiusura impeccabile della cucina. Rispetto delle norme igieniche HACCP — la pulizia è per te una seconda natura. Collaborazione stretta con la cucina, gli acquisti e le risorse umane per assicurare un’esperienza eccellente al nostro staff. Questo sei tu Formazione completata come chef certificato o qualifica equivalente. Esperienza sia in cucina calda che fredda, idealmente nella ristorazione collettiva o nell'industria alberghiera. Passione per il lavoro con le persone — ti piace essere l'host anche per i colleghi. Ottime capacità organizzative, resilienza e stile di lavoro strutturato. Creatività nella pianificazione dei menù — stagionale, equilibrato e ricco di sapore. Buona conoscenza del tedesco e dell'inglese; l'italiano è un plus. Se desideri coniugare l'amore per le arti culinarie con una vera mentalità da host — e contribuire a uno dei più bei hotel in Svizzera — attendiamo con piacere la tua candidatura. Benefit Nel Gruppo Kulm, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo opportunità di sviluppo interessanti, alloggi confortevoli, pasti a prezzo agevolato nella mensa per il personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Cuoco colazione / Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Persone a 1800 m di altitudine stanno plasmando il Luxury Mountain Travel. Creatività al buffet: sei responsabile della preparazione e presentazione del nostro magnifico buffet quotidiano. Dalla frutta fresca tagliata con precisione ai più fini pasticcini — ogni dettaglio conta. Maestro dei piatti a base d’uovo: che si tratti di soffici omelette o perfetti Eggs Benedict, prepari gli ordini à la carte con maestria e rapidità. Qualità e cura: supervisioni la conservazione delle materie prime e garantisci freschezza assoluta. Ordine e igiene (HACCP) sono il tuo biglietto da visita. Spirito di squadra: quando necessario, supporti attivamente i Chefs de Partie e collabori per mantenere i nostri eccellenti standard. Inizio previsto: giugno, fine circa 04.06.2027. Questo sei tu Il mattiniero prende il verme. Mentre gli altri dormono ancora, tu sei al meglio. Cerchiamo una personalità solare che ami le prime ore del giorno e accompagni i nostri ospiti nella giornata con energia e sorriso. Formazione: sei uno chef certificato o hai almeno 2 anni di esperienza professionale specifica in questo ambito. Competenze: hai padroneggiato vari metodi di cottura e le arti della pasticceria per la colazione. Mentalità: applichi le ricette standard dell'hotel con sicurezza e hai occhio al miglioramento continuo. Affidabilità: puntualità, igiene personale e postazione di lavoro pulita sono per te naturali. Lingue: italiano e inglese o tedesco. Perché Kronenhof Lavorare con noi significa far parte di una leggenda dell'ospitalità svizzera — in un contesto dove il talento è davvero valorizzato. Offriamo impiego stabile in una delle location più esclusive al mondo. Vita in Engadina: ti supportiamo con la logistica! Forniamo alloggi per il personale a prezzi equi e fissi, così potrai goderti la natura e le attività a Pontresina senza stress. Crescita: opportunità continue di formazione e sviluppo. Vuoi portare la tua passione in cucina e far brillare la colazione al Grand Hotel Kronenhof? Attendiamo con piacere la tua candidatura! Offriamo opportunità di sviluppo interessanti, alloggi confortevoli, pasti a prezzo agevolato nella mensa per il personale e numerosi vantaggi. ## Maître de Rang (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Eleva la tua carriera a nuove altezze a 1800 m di altitudine e diventa parte della famiglia Kulm Group. Sei pronto a ridefinire l'esperienza del luxury mountain travel? Unisciti al nostro team dinamico e internazionale di Kulm Group, dove insieme offriamo ai nostri ospiti un'esperienza di lusso unica e creiamo ricordi indimenticabili. Perché Kulm Group? descriptionByLocale.de: Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-01. ## Das ist, was Sie mit uns bewegen Luxuriös. Ambitioniert. Visionär. In dieser neu geschaffenen Schlüsselposition gestalten Sie aktiv die kulinarische Ausrichtung unseres Hauses als strategische treibende Kraft hinter unseren Food & Beverage Konzepten. Sie designen die Zukunft unserer F&B-Welt — visionär, mutig und mit dem Anspruch, Exzellenz auf das nächste Level zu heben. Was diese Rolle einzigartig macht: Leadership auf Augenhöhe: Sie führen ein Team von sieben erfahrenen Abteilungsleitern und rund 70 Mitarbeitenden — mit Klarheit, Inspiration und echtem Talent zur Personalentwicklung. Konzeptarchitekt & Innovator: Sie evaluieren bestehende Konzepte, entwickeln neue Ideen, identifizieren F&B‑Trends und nutzen sie gezielt. Sie denken einen Schritt weiter und schaffen Erlebnisse, die unsere Gäste begeistern. Strategie trifft Profitabilität: Budgetierung, Forecasting, Margin‑Optimierung — Ihre Entscheidungen sind datengetrieben, wobei die Guest‑Experience stets im Vordergrund bleibt. Operative Exzellenz: Sie etablieren Qualitätsstandards, vereinfachen Prozesse, implementieren neue Tools und modernisieren Systeme. Für Sie ist Effizienz das Ergebnis starker Führung. Connector & Multiplier: Sie agieren als strategischer Partner für General Management, Culinary, Marketing, Sales und Events — mit Weitblick, Professionalität und herausragenden Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. Erlebnisse schaffen statt nur planen: Von Weinverkostungen über Pop‑Up‑Konzepte bis zu Signature‑Events kuratieren Sie unvergessliche Momente, die unseren Gästen lange nach ihrem Aufenthalt im Gedächtnis bleiben. ## Das sind Sie Abgeschlossene Ausbildung im Hotel- oder Gastronomiebereich – idealerweise ergänzt durch ein weiterführendes Management‑Studium. Mehrjährige Führungserfahrung im F&B‑Bereich eines Luxushotels. Exzellente Deutsch‑ und Englischkenntnisse; Italienisch ist von Vorteil. Unternehmerisches Mindset, starke Zahlenaffinität und ein ausgeprägtes Qualitätsbewusstsein. Hands‑on‑Mentalität, diplomatisches Geschick und sicheres Auftreten in jeder Situation. Sind Sie bereit, neue kulinarische Standards zu setzen und mit einem leidenschaftlichen Team auf höchstem Niveau zu arbeiten? Dann freuen wir uns auf Ihre Bewerbung. ## Benefits Bei der Kulm Group stehen unsere Mitarbeitenden im Mittelpunkt unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, preiswerte Mahlzeiten im Mitarbeiterspeisehaus und zahlreiche Zusatzleistungen. [Apply now] ## Cook – Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Menschen in 1800 m Höhe prägen das Luxury Mountain Travel. Unsere dynamische und internationale Community bietet unseren Gästen smart Luxury für ein unvergleichliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Teil der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie ein Schlüssel zu unserem Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt tief inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und so leben wir unsere Kultur: understated luxury, Inspiration und ein Life‑Experience. Gemeinsam machen wir es möglich. Das ist Ihre Chance, Teil unserer prägenden Kultur zu werden: Ihre Mission Ihre Bühne – unser Herz hinter den Kulissen: In unserem Hotel stehen nicht nur die Gäste im Mittelpunkt – auch unsere Mitarbeitenden verdienen kulinarische Momente, die inspirieren. Als Cook in unserem neu etablierten Staff Restaurant sind Sie sowohl Gastgeber als auch kulinarischer Experte. Mit frischer, kreativer Küche und einem offenen Ohr für die Wünsche des Teams sorgen Sie dafür, dass sich Kolleg*innen wirklich zu Hause fühlen. Ihre Aufgaben Zubereitung abwechslungsreicher, ausgewogener Menüs für unser Team – mit Liebe zum Detail und Qualitätsanspruch. Gastgeber im Staff Restaurant: Begrüßung, Interaktion und Schaffung einer positiven Atmosphäre. Menüplanung und Umsetzung von kulinarischen Themenwochen – Ihre Ideen sind willkommen. Kombination aus Buffetservice und Live‑Cooking. Sicherstellung reibungsloser Abläufe in Ihrem Bereich – von Mise en Place bis zur makellosen Küchenabschließung. Einhaltung der HACCP‑Hygienestandards – Sauberkeit ist für Sie selbstverständlich. Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Küchenteam, Einkauf und HR, um ein großartiges Erlebnis für unser Personal zu gewährleisten. Das sind Sie Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Koch/Köchin oder gleichwertige Qualifikation. Erfahrung in heißer und kalter Küche, idealerweise in der Gemeinschaftsverpflegung oder Hotellerie. Leidenschaft für die Arbeit mit Menschen – Sie genießen es, Gastgeber für Kolleg*innen zu sein. Starke Organisationsfähigkeiten, Belastbarkeit und strukturierte Arbeitsweise. Kreativität in der Menüplanung – saisonal, ausgewogen und geschmackvoll. Gute Deutsch‑ und Englischkenntnisse, Italienisch von Vorteil. Wenn Sie Ihre Liebe zur Kochkunst mit einer echten Gastgeber‑Mentalität verbinden und zu einem der schönsten Hotels der Schweiz beitragen möchten, freuen wir uns auf Ihre Bewerbung. Benefits Bei der Kulm Group stehen unsere Mitarbeitenden im Mittelpunkt unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, preiswerte Mahlzeiten im Mitarbeiterspeisehaus und zahlreiche Zusatzleistungen. ## Breakfast Cook / Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Menschen in 1800 m Höhe prägen das Luxury Mountain Travel. Unsere dynamische und internationale Community bietet unseren Gästen smart Luxury für ein unvergleichliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Teil der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie ein Schlüssel zu unserem Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt tief inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und so leben wir unsere Kultur: understated luxury, Inspiration und ein Life‑Experience. Gemeinsam machen wir es möglich. Das ist Ihre Chance, Teil unserer prägenden Kultur zu werden: Das ist, was Sie mit uns bewegen Es geht nicht nur ums Kochen; es geht darum, den wichtigsten Moment des Tages in einem Umfeld höchster Standards zu inszenieren. Kreativität am Buffet: Sie sind verantwortlich für die Zubereitung und Präsentation unseres großartigen täglichen Buffets. Von präzise geschnittenem frischem Obst bis zu den feinsten Petit‑Fours – jedes Detail zählt. Meister der Eiergerichte: Ob fluffige Omeletts oder perfekte Eggs Benedict – Sie bereiten à la carte‑Bestellungen mit Meisterschaft und Geschwindigkeit zu. Qualität und Sorgfalt: Sie überwachen die Lagerung von Rohstoffen und garantieren absolute Frische. Ordnung und Hygiene (HACCP) sind Ihr Markenzeichen. Teamgeist: Bei Bedarf unterstützen Sie aktiv die Chefs de Partie und arbeiten gemeinsam an der Aufrechterhaltung unserer hohen Standards. Start: Juni, voraussichtliches Ende ca. 04.06.2027. Wir suchen eine sonnige Persönlichkeit, die die frühen Morgen liebt und unsere Gäste mit Energie und Lächeln in den Tag begleitet. Architecte de concepts & innovateur : vous évaluez les concepts existants, développez de nouvelles idées, identifiez les tendances F&B et les exploitez délibérément. Stratégie et rentabilité : budgétisation, prévisions, optimisation des marges — vos décisions sont guidées par les données tout en gardant l’expérience client au premier plan. jobs.title: Front Office Agent (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Front Office Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
As a Front Office Agent, you are often the first and last point of contact for our international guests. In this role, you combine genuine warmth with the precision of 5-star hospitality, turning every stay into an unforgettable experience.Your Responsibilities:The First Impression: Heartfelt check-in & check-out, professional rooming, and competent guest support throughout their entire stay.
Service Excellence: Active contribution to a smooth daily front office operation according to the high standards of "The Leading Hotels of the World" (LHW).
Coordination: Handling and processing reservations via Protel, as well as reliable cash management.
Communication: Confident handling of guest inquiries and complaint management with tact and diplomacy.

## This is you
Foundation: Completed vocational training in the hotel industry and (initial) professional experience at the front office of a luxury or upscale hotel.
Languages: Fluent in German and English. Additional languages are a welcome asset.
IT Skills: Proficient in using Opera Cloud and MS Office.
Personality: You stand out through your well-groomed appearance, a resilient nature, and a genuine passion for the art of service.
Why the Kulm? We offer you a workplace in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Look forward to a motivated team, attractive benefits within the Kulm Group, and the opportunity to gain valuable experience in a tradition-rich environment.Ready for the Kulm Spirit? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.
This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Driver  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.title: Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.
Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.
Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.description:
Maître de Rang (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01.

## This is what you move with us
You confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.
You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.
You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.
You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.
You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.
You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.

## This is you
A completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.
Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.
Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.
Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.
Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.
Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.
Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive.
