This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.

Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.
Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.

Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!

jobs.title: Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-10-01.

## This is what you move with us
Front Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.
Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.
Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.
Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.
Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.

## This is you
Experience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.
Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.
Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.
Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services  (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usHandling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team. Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling. Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data. Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier. Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team. Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.
This is youA structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus. A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications. A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.de:
Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-10-01.

## This is what you move with us
Front Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.
Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.
Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.
Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.
Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.

## This is you
Experience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.
Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.
Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.
Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

jobs.title: Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-10.

## This is what you move with us
Cleanliness and Organization: You will ensure impeccable cleanliness and order in our high-end kitchen and the restaurant's back office.
Careful Handling: You will be responsible for the precise handling, cleaning, and storage of porcelain, silverware, glassware, and blackware.
Coordination and Organization: Ensure smooth operations through efficient organization and coordination of daily tasks.
Start: immediate

## This is you
Hospitality Experience: You bring solid experience from the hospitality industry, ideally in a high-demand environment.
Language Skills: German or English or Italian
Flexibility and Team Spirit: Your ability to adapt to changing requirements and work effectively within a dynamic team is a key strength.
Start: per immediate wanted, until ca. 06.04.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.
This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usDo you thrive on crystal-clear processes, impeccable hygiene, and teamwork at a 5-star superior level? Become the driving force behind our culinary experiences and ensure flawless operations in the back-of-house. Your Responsibilities:  Shift & Duty Planning across multiple outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, external events) – you orchestrate seamless operations from mise-en-place to breakdown. Leadership & Coaching of the Stewarding Team: daily briefings, clear standards, motivating presence – and when the pressure is on, you lead by working hands-on. Hygiene & Quality Assurance at the highest level (HACCP-compliant): inspections, documentation, and training to guarantee spotless standards. Dishwashing & Equipment Management: efficient use of modern facilities, care and maintenance, acting as a key link between kitchen, service, and events. Inventory & Cost Control: keeping track of stock, chemicals, and consumables; ensuring efficient processes without downtime. Event Excellence: logistics for large-scale functions, setting up return stations, and managing swift turnarounds.
This is youExperience in luxury hospitality/catering within Stewarding or Back-of-House – ideally in a supervisory or assistant managerial role. Practical mindset & overview: you make smart decisions, remain calm in peak times, and take ownership. Leadership & communication skills. Hands-on mentality: proactive, solution-oriented, and a role model for cleanliness, order, and efficiency. Solid knowledge of hygiene & technology: HACCP expertise, familiarity with cleaning technology, and confidence with planning/office tools. Flexibility: willingness to work shifts, weekends, and support events – you enjoy the pulse of a lively luxury property. Languages: Portuguese or Italian as well as English.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Sei il cuore delle nostre operazioni dietro le quinte, assicurando non solo la pulizia impeccabile, ma anche sostenere attivamente il nostro team di cucina con preparazioni culinarie. I vostri compiti: cucina Supporto: Si assiste attivamente con il lavoro di preparazione (mise-en-place), come il taglio professionale di verdure e altri compiti preparatori. Ordine e pulizia: Assicurate una pulizia impeccabile e l'organizzazione nella nostra cucina moderna, così come nell'ufficio posteriore del ristorante Capricorn. Attenzione: Siete responsabili per la pulizia, la cura e lo stoccaggio preciso di porcellana, vetreria, posate e utensili da cucina (pot e pentole). Coordinamento e Organizzazione: Si lavora a stretto contatto con i team di cucina e servizio per garantire operazioni fluide — anche durante ore di punta occupato. # Questa è l'esperienza professionale: Porti una solida esperienza nel settore della gastronomia, idealmente da un ambiente hotel a 4 o 5 stelle. Interessi nelle arti culinarie: Vi piace la gestione di ingredienti freschi e sono felici di sostenere il team con la preparazione di cibo. Competenze linguistiche: Si comunica con fiducia in tedesco, inglese o italiano. Personalità: Sei caratterizzato da flessibilità e la capacità di lavorare bene in un team. Apprezzi un ambiente dinamico e goditi il lavoro in un team motivato. ## Benefits At Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. Du bist das Herzstück unserer Back-of-House-Abteilung und sorgst nicht nur für makellose Sauberkeit, sondern unterstützt unsere Küche auch aktiv bei der kulinarischen Vorbereitung. Deine Aufgaben: Küchenunterstützung: Du hilfst aktiv bei der Vorbereitung (Mise-en-place), z. B. beim professionellen Schneiden von Gemüse und anderen vorbereitenden Tätigkeiten. Sorgfältiger Umgang: Du übernimmst die präzise Reinigung, Pflege und Lagerung von Geschirr, Besteck, Gläsern und Küchenutensilien (Töpfen und Pfannen). Interesse an Kulinarik: Du hast Freude am Umgang mit frischen Lebensmitteln und unterstützt das Team gerne bei der Speisenvorbereitung. Sprachkenntnisse: Du kommunizierst sicher auf Deutsch, Englisch oder Italienisch. Persönlichkeit: Du zeichnest dich durch Flexibilität und Teamfähigkeit aus. Du schätzt ein dynamisches Umfeld und arbeitest gerne in einem motivierten Team. ## Benefits Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeitenden das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Weiterentwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche weitere Vergünstigungen. Werde zum Treibstoff hinter unseren kulinarischen Erlebnissen und sorge für einwandfreie Abläufe im Back-of-House. Deine Verantwortung: Schicht- & Aufgabenplanung über mehrere Outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Bankette, externe Events) – Du orchestrierst reibungslose Abläufe von der Mise-en-place bis zum Abbau. Führung & Coaching des Stewarding-Teams: tägliche Briefings, klare Standards, motivierende Präsenz – und wenn’s drauf ankommt, gehst du voran. Geschirr- & Equipmentmanagement: effizienter Einsatz moderner Anlagen, Pflege und Wartung, Schlüsselfunktion zwischen Küche, Service und Events. Event-Exzellenz: Logistik für Großveranstaltungen, Aufbau von Rückgabestationen und schnelle Umbauphasen. ## Das bist du Erfahrung im Luxus-Hospitality/Catering im Stewarding oder Back-of-House – idealerweise in einer supervisory- oder assistent-manager-Rolle. Praxisorientierter Blick & Überblick: Du triffst kluge Entscheidungen, bleibst in Spitzenzeiten ruhig und übernimmst Verantwortung. Führungs- & Kommunikationsstärke. Hands-on-Mentalität: proaktiv, lösungsorientiert und Vorbild in Sauberkeit, Ordnung und Effizienz. Solides Hygiene- & Technik-Know-how: HACCP-Expertise, Kenntnisse über Reinigungstechnik und sicherer Umgang mit Planungs-/Office-Tools. Flexibilität: Bereitschaft zu Schicht-, Wochenend- und Eventeinsätzen – du liebst den Puls einer lebendigen Luxus-Destination. Sprachen: Portugiesisch oder Italienisch sowie Englisch. ## Benefits Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeitenden das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. descriptionByLocale.fr: Employé de bureau – Steward (début immédiat) (h/f/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadine, Grisons). Taux d’occupation: 100 %. Contrat: poste saisonnier. Prise de poste: 10.02.2026. ## Ce que vous ferez chez nous Nous recherchons un soutien énergique pour notre restaurant du personnel moderne, le Capricorn, construit il y a tout juste un an. Vous êtes le cœur de nos opérations en coulisses, garantissant non seulement une propreté irréprochable, mais soutenant aussi activement notre brigade de cuisine dans les préparations culinaires. Vos tâches: Soutien cuisine: vous participez activement aux travaux de préparation (mise-en-place), comme la découpe professionnelle des légumes et autres tâches préparatoires. Ordre & propreté: vous assurez une propreté et une organisation parfaites dans notre cuisine moderne ainsi que dans le back-office du restaurant Capricorn. Manipulation soignée: vous êtes responsable du nettoyage précis, de l’entretien et du rangement de la vaisselle, des couverts, verres et ustensiles de cuisine (casseroles et poêles). Coordination & organisation: vous collaborez étroitement avec les équipes cuisine et service pour garantir un déroulement fluide — même pendant les pointes de fréquentation. ## C’est vous Expérience professionnelle: vous possédez une solide expérience dans la restauration, idéalement dans un hôtel 4 ou 5 étoiles. Intérêt pour la cuisine: vous aimez manipuler des produits frais et soutenir volontiers l’équipe dans la préparation des mets. Compétences linguistiques: vous communiquez aisément en allemand, anglais ou italien. Personnalité: vous êtes flexible et aimez travailler en équipe. Vous appréciez un environnement dynamique et aimez évoluer dans une équipe motivée. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des logements confortables, des repas à prix avantageux au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux autres avantages. Postulez dès maintenant ## Supervisor Stewarding (h/f/d) Kulm Hotel Des personnes à 1800 m d’altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos hôtes un smart luxury pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du Luxury Kulm Group, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Ainsi, nous embrassons notre culture: luxe discret, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous faisons en sorte que cela arrive. C’est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture façonnante: ## Ce que vous ferez chez nous Vous êtes passionné par des processus clairs, une hygiène irréprochable et le travail d’équipe au niveau 5 étoiles supérieur? Devenez la force motrice de nos expériences culinaires et assurez des opérations parfaites en back-of-house. Vos responsabilités: Planification des shifts & tâches sur plusieurs points de vente (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, banquets, événements externes) – vous orchestrez des opérations fluides de la mise-en-place au breakdown. Leadership & coaching de l’équipe stewarding: briefings quotidiens, standards clairs, présence motivante – et quand la pression monte, vous montrez l’exemple en étant sur le terrain. Assurance hygiène & qualité au plus haut niveau (conforme HACCP): inspections, documentations et formations pour garantir des standards impeccables. Gestion du lavage & équipement: utilisation efficace des installations modernes, entretien, maîtrise du lien entre cuisine, service et événements. Contrôle des stocks & coûts: suivi des stocks, produits chimiques et consommables; processus efficaces sans temps d’arrêt. Excellence événementielle: logistique pour grandes fonctions, mise en place des stations de retour et gestion de rotations rapides. ## C’est vous Expérience dans l’hôtellerie de luxe / restauration en stewarding ou back-of-house – idéalement en rôle de supervision ou assistant manager. État d’esprit pratique & vue d’ensemble: vous prenez des décisions intelligentes, restez calme en période de pointe et assumez la responsabilité. Compétences en leadership & communication. Mentalité hands-on: proactif, orienté solutions et modèle de propreté, d’ordre et d’efficacité. Solides connaissances hygiène & technologie: expertise HACCP, familiarité avec la technologie de nettoyage et aisance avec les outils de planification/bureau. Flexibilité: volonté de travailler par shifts, week-ends et de soutenir les événements – vous aimez le rythme d’une propriété de luxe dynamique. Langues: portugais ou italien ainsi qu’anglais. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des logements confortables, des repas à prix avantageux au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux autres avantages. ## Employé de bureau – Steward (début immédiat) (h/f/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof Des personnes à 1800 m d’altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Manipulation soignée: vous serez responsable de la manipulation, du nettoyage et du rangement précis de la vaisselle, couverts, verrerie et ustensiles. Coordination & organisation: garantir des opérations fluides grâce à une organisation et un coordination efficaces des tâches quotidiennes. Début: immédiat ## C’est vous Expérience hôtelière: vous possédez une solide expérience dans l’industrie hôtelière, idéalement dans un environnement exigeant. Compétences linguistiques: allemand ou anglais ou italien Flexibilité & esprit d’équipe: votre capacité à vous adapter aux exigences changeantes et à travailler efficacement au sein d’une équipe dynamique est un atout majeur. Début: souhaité immédiat, jusqu’à env. 06.04. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des logements confortables, des repas à prix avantageux au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux autres avantages. ## Tapissier (h/f/d) Kulm Hotel Des personnes à 1800 m d’altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Œil pour le détail: création et gestion des listes de défauts ainsi que signalement proactif des dégâts. Coordination & communication: obtention et négociation des devis ainsi que collaboration avec des spécialistes externes. Compétences techniques: entretien minutieux et maniement des machines et outils. Créer l’ambiance: organiser et mettre en œuvre des décorations de vacances stylées dans l’hôtel. Passer les commandes auprès des fournisseurs avec le Technical Manager. ## C’est vous Idéalement, formation complète en tapisserie, décoration d’intérieur ou qualification similaire. Expérience dans l’entretien et la conception d’intérieurs haut-de-gamme. Capacité à prendre des décisions autonomes dans votre domaine & gestion professionnelle des urgences. Langues: italien obligatoire, plus allemand ou anglais. Responsable, orienté solutions et passionné par l’aménagement d’intérieur stylé. Début: à convenir ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des logements confortables, des repas à prix avantageux au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux autres avantages.

jobs.title: Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Creating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.
A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.
Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.
Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.

## This is you
Holder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.
Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.
Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.
An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Florist (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usResponsible for all floral arrangements in our hotel, including creating centerpieces, bouquets, etc.Decorating public spaces not only for daily use but also for special occasions such as holidays, gala events, private functions, etc.Organizing and advising on outdoor landscapingProper care of flowers and green plantsProcurement of all flowers, plants, and materialsConcept development and implementation while adhering to the specified budget
This is youYou have successfully completed training in floristry and have several years of experience (preferably in the hotel industry)With a creative flair, you know how to delight our guests with your floral decorations and create an impressive atmosphere and unique ambiance within and outside our luxury hotelYou are flexible, appreciate good communication, and are accustomed to working independently.Even under pressure, you remain composed and calm, and you have a natural and friendly demeanor towards guests and colleagues.Languages: English or German
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Florist (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usThe Kulm Hotel is world-renowned for its magnificent halls and meticulous attention to detail. As the right hand to our Head Florist, you will play a key role in transforming our hotel into a blooming masterpiece. You are more than a florist – you are an ambassador of aesthetics and elegance.Your Mission:Creative Staging: You will take a leading role in the entire floral design—from delicate table arrangements to grand, imposing bouquets for our most exclusive suites.Event Highlights: Showcase your skills in large-scale floral design during glamorous weddings, gala evenings, and major seasonal projects (such as our legendary Christmas and New Year's Eve decorations).Perfection in Detail: You ensure a consistently flawless appearance of all arrangements and green plants, both indoors and outdoors.Taking Responsibility: You support the department head operationally, coordinate flower deliveries, and ensure that our high quality standards are felt in every single arrangement.Start Date: June 1st, 2026 
This is youFoundation: You have a completed vocational training as a Florist and initial professional experience in the field.Creative Passion: You have a sharp eye for colors, shapes, and current trends. Your goal is to create an "imposing atmosphere" for our international guests.Composure: Even during major events and high-volume periods, you work precisely and efficiently, always maintaining an eye for the smallest detail.Personality: Your appearance is as polished as your floral work. You are a proactive communicator within the team and a warm point of contact for our guests.Languages: You are able to communicate effectively in either German or English.Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a stage for your creativity in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Become part of a team that values true craftsmanship, encourages initiative, and thrives in a culture of mutual respect and team spirit.Are you ready to make the Kulm bloom? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Spa Therapist (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usPamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area.
This is youCompleted training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Creating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.
A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.
Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.
Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.

## This is you
Holder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.
Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.
Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.
An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

jobs.title: Porter Tournant (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Porter Tournant (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Transporting guest luggage during arrival and departure
Cleaning rooms and suites as well as public areas
Performing errands and snow removal in winter
Careful handling and maintenance of machines and equipment
Supporting floor porters and participating in housekeeping meetings and training sessions

## This is you
Professional experience in a similar position in luxury hotels
Reliability and discretion
Passion for service and enjoyment of teamwork
Must have: good German or English skills, ideally additional languages
Well-groomed appearance

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    50%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usAt the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.
This is youOrganizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.
This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.de:
Porter Tournant (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Transporting guest luggage during arrival and departure
Cleaning rooms and suites as well as public areas
Performing errands and snow removal in winter
Careful handling and maintenance of machines and equipment
Supporting floor porters and participating in housekeeping meetings and training sessions

## This is you
Professional experience in a similar position in luxury hotels
Reliability and discretion
Passion for service and enjoyment of teamwork
Must have: good German or English skills, ideally additional languages
Well-groomed appearance

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    50%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usAt the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.
This is youOrganizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.title: Reservations Agent  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Reservations Agent  (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

## This is what you move with us
Competently handle reservations for individual and group guests as the first point of contact, ensuring the highest level of professionalism and proactive attention to detail 
  Maintain and update guest databases with the utmost accuracy, contributing significantly to guest satisfaction and loyalty 
  Address and resolve guest complaints promptly and with sensitivity, always finding the most suitable solution in a discreet and efficient manner 
  Manage multichannel communication, responding to all incoming enquiries by phone and email 
  Coordinate with other departments to ensure optimal alignment between room and event occupancy and our F&B and Spa offerings 
  Support the Reservations Manager with administrative tasks, ensure adherence to our high standards, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our products

## This is you
Charisma and friendliness with a natural warmth and refined manners, combined with a keen sense for the needs of discerning guests 
  Team spirit and flexibility, with excellent communication skills and the ability to adapt in a dynamic work environment 
  Experience in luxury hospitality, with completed vocational training and at least two years of experience in a 5-star hotel in Front Office or Reservations 
  Strong language skills in German and English (written and spoken); additional languages such as Italian are an advantage 
  Technical proficiency in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook, as well as experience managing online booking channels 
  Exceptional organisational skills and customer focus, ensuring precise planning, discreet guest relations, and outstanding service delivery

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.
This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.

Voici votre formation professionnelle: Vous avez suivi une formation professionnelle en hospitalité ou dans un domaine commercial – idéalement au sein de l'hospitalité de luxe – et vous offrez plusieurs années d'expérience pertinente. État d'esprit des ventes: Vous comprenez ce qui motive les décisions de réservation et comment élever l'expérience des clients à travers les ventes de chambres stratégiques. Compétences linguistiques : Vous parlez et écrivez couramment en allemand et en anglais; une connaissance supplémentaire du français ou de l'italien est un plus. Composure & clarté: Que ce soit sous pression ou en communication directe avec les clients, vous restez professionnel, efficace et chaleureux. Orientation vers la croissance & #160;: Vous êtes impatient non seulement de répondre aux attentes, mais d'améliorer les processus et d'investir dans votre propre développement. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Nachtportier/ Auditeur de nuit (m/w/d) Grand Hôtel Kronenhof 100% Les personnes à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nousFront Office & Guest: Traitement des arrivées tardives et des départs anticipés, fournissant une assistance professionnelle aux clients par téléphone, et répondant aux demandes spéciales des clients. Service de voiturier et de bagages: Parking des véhicules invités dans le garage ainsi que de l'aide pour le service de bagages et de chambres. Audit de nuit : Compléter la fermeture quotidienne du système (Opera Cloud), vérifier les rapports des points de vente et gérer le traitement physique des espèces pour le service comptable. Sécurité & Contrôle & #160;: Effectuer régulièrement des rondes de sécurité, surveiller le panneau d'alarme incendie et assurer la paix et la tranquillité nocturnes dans l'ensemble des locaux. Préparation: Générer des rapports département, acheter et poster des journaux, et fournir des services de cire de chaussures pour nos invités. C'est vousExpérience: Une solide expérience dans l'industrie hôtelière (de préférence dans le segment 5 étoiles) et idéalement une expérience antérieure dans les équipes de nuit. Les Compétence : Gestion fiable des systèmes PMS (Opera Cloud) ainsi que des applications MS Office standard. Langues : Connaissance de l'allemand et de l'anglais ; la connaissance de l'italien est un avantage important en raison de notre emplacement et de notre clientèle. Engagement : Un permis de conduire valide et l'aptitude physique requise pour les rondes de sécurité et la manutention des bagages. Personnalité : Un haut sens des responsabilités, une discrétion absolue et une apparence polie qui répond à nos standards de luxe. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Conducteur (m/w/d) Grand Hôtel Kronenhof 100% Les personnes à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous Accueil chaleureux pour nos invités: Avec votre convivialité naturelle et votre charisme, chaque invité se sent chez lui dès le premier moment. Service de voiturier: Vous garez nos invités ' véhicules dans le garage souterrain et gérer la logistique de garage, toujours avec attention au détail et à la commande. Transferts aux clients : Qu'il s'agisse de l'ascenseur de ski ou du restaurant, vous gérez les transferts des clients avec la navette de l'hôtel, assurant un trajet sûr et agréable. Services aux clients: chargement/déchargement des bagages des clients et manutention de petites courses au besoin. C'est vous Amabilité naturelle et Charisme: Vous pouvez presque anticiper les besoins de nos clients éclairés et faire tout votre possible pour que leur séjour soit le plus agréable possible. Comparance groomed et Excellent Manners : Vous représentez notre hôtel avec style, impressionnant avec politesse professionnelle et un comportement élégant. Esprit d'équipe et flexibilité : Vous aimez travailler dans une équipe dynamique, s'adapter rapidement à diverses exigences, toujours avec un sourire. Permis de conduire valide 's: Bien sûr, vous avez un permis de conduire valide 's et vous vous sentez à l'aise dans des espaces de stationnement serrés et sur la route. Compétences linguistiques : Idéalement, vous parlez allemand et anglais, avec d'autres langues (en particulier l'italien) étant un avantage de bienvenue. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Service Employee Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Service Employee Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
True hospitality at eye level: our new staff restaurant will be your domain – a place where colleagues are made to feel like valued guests.
Full responsibility for delivering first-class, seamless service – from daily mise en place to the final touch at the buffet.
More than just routine: together with the kitchen team, you’ll create thoughtful offerings and little moments of well-being during the workday.
A role model for quality and care – you serve as the empathetic bridge between our team members and outstanding service.
Not just following, but shaping: your ideas and initiative will actively help evolve our internal hospitality culture.

## This is you
Completed vocational training in service, ideally some experience in 5-star hospitality.
A strong sense of quality, passion for hospitality, and an eye for detail – and the ability to connect with people.
Resilient, independent, and team-oriented with a hands-on mindset.
Composed and professional – even when the pressure’s on.
languages: Italian plus English or German
Willingness to work weekends and holidays – always with a smile, for the people who make it all happen.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Grand Hotel Kronenhof

            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.

Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
