jobs.title: Spa Therapist (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Spa Therapist (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-11-15.

## This is what you move with us
Pamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.
With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.
Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.
Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.
Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.
Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area.

## This is you
Completed training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.
Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.
Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.
Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.
Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.
Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usCreating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.
This is youHolder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Florist (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usResponsible for all floral arrangements in our hotel, including creating centerpieces, bouquets, etc.Decorating public spaces not only for daily use but also for special occasions such as holidays, gala events, private functions, etc.Organizing and advising on outdoor landscapingProper care of flowers and green plantsProcurement of all flowers, plants, and materialsConcept development and implementation while adhering to the specified budget
This is youYou have successfully completed training in floristry and have several years of experience (preferably in the hotel industry)With a creative flair, you know how to delight our guests with your floral decorations and create an impressive atmosphere and unique ambiance within and outside our luxury hotelYou are flexible, appreciate good communication, and are accustomed to working independently.Even under pressure, you remain composed and calm, and you have a natural and friendly demeanor towards guests and colleagues.Languages: English or German
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Florist (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usThe Kulm Hotel is world-renowned for its magnificent halls and meticulous attention to detail. As the right hand to our Head Florist, you will play a key role in transforming our hotel into a blooming masterpiece. You are more than a florist – you are an ambassador of aesthetics and elegance.Your Mission:Creative Staging: You will take a leading role in the entire floral design—from delicate table arrangements to grand, imposing bouquets for our most exclusive suites.Event Highlights: Showcase your skills in large-scale floral design during glamorous weddings, gala evenings, and major seasonal projects (such as our legendary Christmas and New Year's Eve decorations).Perfection in Detail: You ensure a consistently flawless appearance of all arrangements and green plants, both indoors and outdoors.Taking Responsibility: You support the department head operationally, coordinate flower deliveries, and ensure that our high quality standards are felt in every single arrangement.Start Date: June 1st, 2026 
This is youFoundation: You have a completed vocational training as a Florist and initial professional experience in the field.Creative Passion: You have a sharp eye for colors, shapes, and current trends. Your goal is to create an "imposing atmosphere" for our international guests.Composure: Even during major events and high-volume periods, you work precisely and efficiently, always maintaining an eye for the smallest detail.Personality: Your appearance is as polished as your floral work. You are a proactive communicator within the team and a warm point of contact for our guests.Languages: You are able to communicate effectively in either German or English.Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a stage for your creativity in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Become part of a team that values true craftsmanship, encourages initiative, and thrives in a culture of mutual respect and team spirit.Are you ready to make the Kulm bloom? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.de:
Spa Therapist (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-11-15.

## This is what you move with us
Pamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.
With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.
Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.
Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.
Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.
Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area.

## This is you
Completed training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.
Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.
Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.
Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.
Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.
Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

jobs.title: Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Do you thrive on crystal-clear processes, impeccable hygiene, and teamwork at a 5-star superior level? Become the driving force behind our culinary experiences and ensure flawless operations in the back-of-house. Your Responsibilities:  Shift & Duty Planning across multiple outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, external events) – you orchestrate seamless operations from mise-en-place to breakdown.
 Leadership & Coaching of the Stewarding Team: daily briefings, clear standards, motivating presence – and when the pressure is on, you lead by working hands-on.
 Hygiene & Quality Assurance at the highest level (HACCP-compliant): inspections, documentation, and training to guarantee spotless standards.
 Dishwashing & Equipment Management: efficient use of modern facilities, care and maintenance, acting as a key link between kitchen, service, and events.
 Inventory & Cost Control: keeping track of stock, chemicals, and consumables; ensuring efficient processes without downtime.
 Event Excellence: logistics for large-scale functions, setting up return stations, and managing swift turnarounds.

## This is you
Experience in luxury hospitality/catering within Stewarding or Back-of-House – ideally in a supervisory or assistant managerial role.
 Practical mindset & overview: you make smart decisions, remain calm in peak times, and take ownership.
 Leadership & communication skills.
 Hands-on mentality: proactive, solution-oriented, and a role model for cleanliness, order, and efficiency.
 Solid knowledge of hygiene & technology: HACCP expertise, familiarity with cleaning technology, and confidence with planning/office tools.
 Flexibility: willingness to work shifts, weekends, and support events – you enjoy the pulse of a lively luxury property.
 Languages: Portuguese or Italian as well as English.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.
This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Compétences linguistiques : allemand ou anglais ou italienFlexibilité et esprit d'équipe : Votre capacité à s'adapter à des exigences changeantes et à travailler efficacement au sein d'une équipe dynamique est une force clé. Début: par immédiat recherché, jusqu'au 06.04. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Rembourrage (m/w/j) Hôtel Kulm 100% Les personnes à 1800m au-dessus du niveau de la mer façonnent le voyage de montagne de luxe. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous Esthétique et préservation de la valeur: Entretien et réparations professionnelles dans tout l'hôtel – du mobilier rembourré aux revêtements muraux Oeil pour détail: Création et gestion de listes de défauts et déclaration proactive des dommages Coordination et communication : Obtenir et négocier des devis et collaborer avec des spécialistes externes Compétences techniques : Entretien et manipulation soigneux de machines et d'outils Création de l'atmosphère : Organisation et mise en oeuvre de décorations de vacances élégantes dans l'hôtelPlacage Commandes avec des fournisseurs avec le responsable technique C'est vous Idéalement, la formation terminée comme rembourrage, décorateur d'intérieur, ou une qualification similaire Expérience dans le maintien et la conception d'intérieurs de haute qualité Capacité de prendre des décisions indépendantes dans votre domaine d'expertise et de gérer les urgences professionnellement Compétences linguistiques : Must-Have: Italien, plus Allemand ou Anglais Responsable, orienté vers la solution et passionné par le design d'intérieur élégantDémarrer: par accord Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Training & Development Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Training & Development Manager (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
In this role, you are the driving force behind the personal and professional development of our teams:Strategic L&D Design: You design the annual training master plan. From onboarding and Service Excellence to resilience and digitalization.
Leadership Partner for CREATE: Working closely with our HR Director, you will anchor our leadership principles within our group of approximately 40 managers. You will facilitate Leader Circles and design workshops that actively shape our corporate culture.
Quality & Impact: You don’t settle for "completed." You develop methods to measure the transfer of knowledge into daily operations (eNPS, Pulse Checks) and manage our L&D KPIs with foresight.
Learning Culture & Innovation: You will build a modern framework of coaching, mentoring, and feedback, integrating digital learning tools and HR dashboards for data-driven development.
Excellence through Cooperation: You coordinate collaborations with top-tier partners such as the Swiss Leadership Academy or HSG (University of St. Gallen), purposefully bringing external expertise into the hotels.

## This is you
Expertise: You have several years of experience in L&D or training, ideally within luxury hospitality or a comparable premium service environment.
Methodology: You are a pro at designing and delivering training programs and have experience with cultural transformation and leadership initiatives.
Personality: You are a gifted moderator with high intercultural sensitivity. A hands-on mentality combined with strategic thinking is second nature to you.
Value Ambassador: For you, terms like Generosity, Passion, and Imagination are not just buzzwords, but the foundation of your daily work.
Language Skills: Proficiency in both German and English (ideally also Italian) is mandatory to effectively reach and inspire our international teams.
Why join us:We offer you the creative freedom to shape a modern learning culture in two of the most renowned hotels in the Alps. Here, you will work where others vacation—in an environment defined by mutual appreciation and a relentless pursuit of excellence.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Office Employee - Steward (start immediately) (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWe are looking for energetic support for our modern staff restaurant, Capricorn, which was newly built just under a year ago. You are the heart of our behind-the-scenes operations, ensuring not only impeccable cleanliness but also actively supporting our kitchen team with culinary preparations.Your Tasks:Kitchen Support: You actively assist with preparation work (mise-en-place), such as the professional cutting of vegetables and other preparatory tasks.Order and Cleanliness: You ensure flawless cleanliness and organization in our modern kitchen as well as in the back office of the Capricorn restaurant.Careful Handling: You are responsible for the precise cleaning, care, and storage of china, glassware, cutlery, and kitchenware (pots and pans).Coordination and Organization: You work closely with the kitchen and service teams to ensure smooth operations—even during busy peak hours.
This is youProfessional Experience: You bring solid experience from the gastronomy sector, ideally from a 4- or 5-star hotel environment.Interest in Culinary Arts: You enjoy handling fresh ingredients and are happy to support the team with food preparation.Language Skills: You communicate confidently in German, English, or Italian.Personality: You are characterized by flexibility and the ability to work well in a team. You appreciate a dynamic environment and enjoy working within a motivated team.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usCreating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.
This is youHolder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Training & Development Manager (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
In this role, you are the driving force behind the personal and professional development of our teams:Strategic L&D Design: You design the annual training master plan. From onboarding and Service Excellence to resilience and digitalization.
Leadership Partner for CREATE: Working closely with our HR Director, you will anchor our leadership principles within our group of approximately 40 managers. You will facilitate Leader Circles and design workshops that actively shape our corporate culture.
Quality & Impact: You don’t settle for "completed." You develop methods to measure the transfer of knowledge into daily operations (eNPS, Pulse Checks) and manage our L&D KPIs with foresight.
Learning Culture & Innovation: You will build a modern framework of coaching, mentoring, and feedback, integrating digital learning tools and HR dashboards for data-driven development.
Excellence through Cooperation: You coordinate collaborations with top-tier partners such as the Swiss Leadership Academy or HSG (University of St. Gallen), purposefully bringing external expertise into the hotels.

## This is you
Expertise: You have several years of experience in L&D or training, ideally within luxury hospitality or a comparable premium service environment.
Methodology: You are a pro at designing and delivering training programs and have experience with cultural transformation and leadership initiatives.
Personality: You are a gifted moderator with high intercultural sensitivity. A hands-on mentality combined with strategic thinking is second nature to you.
Value Ambassador: For you, terms like Generosity, Passion, and Imagination are not just buzzwords, but the foundation of your daily work.
Language Skills: Proficiency in both German and English (ideally also Italian) is mandatory to effectively reach and inspire our international teams.
Why join us:We offer you the creative freedom to shape a modern learning culture in two of the most renowned hotels in the Alps. Here, you will work where others vacation—in an environment defined by mutual appreciation and a relentless pursuit of excellence.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Grand Hotel Kronenhof

Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. ## Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usDo you thrive on crystal-clear processes, impeccable hygiene, and teamwork at a 5-star superior level? Become the driving force behind our culinary experiences and ensure flawless operations in the back-of-house. Your Responsibilities:  Shift & Duty Planning across multiple outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, external events) – you orchestrate seamless operations from mise-en-place to breakdown. Leadership & Coaching of the Stewarding Team: daily briefings, clear standards, motivating presence – and when the pressure is on, you lead by working hands-on. Hygiene & Quality Assurance at the highest level (HACCP-compliant): inspections, documentation, and training to guarantee spotless standards. Dishwashing & Equipment Management: efficient use of modern facilities, care and maintenance, acting as a key link between kitchen, service, and events. Inventory & Cost Control: keeping track of stock, chemicals, and consumables; ensuring efficient processes without downtime. Event Excellence: logistics for large-scale functions, setting up return stations, and managing swift turnarounds.
This is youExperience in luxury hospitality/catering within Stewarding or Back-of-House – ideally in a supervisory or assistant managerial role. Practical mindset & overview: you make smart decisions, remain calm in peak times, and take ownership. Leadership & communication skills. Hands-on mentality: proactive, solution-oriented, and a role model for cleanliness, order, and efficiency. Solid knowledge of hygiene & technology: HACCP expertise, familiarity with cleaning technology, and confidence with planning/office tools. Flexibility: willingness to work shifts, weekends, and support events – you enjoy the pulse of a lively luxury property. Languages: Portuguese or Italian as well as English.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.
